description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a boxy, upright structure with a yellow exterior and red accents. The front face is dominated by a large, flat display screen bordered by a thick bezel, with two black and red joysticks and six red buttons arranged on a slanted control panel below. The control panel is marked with a 'WARNING' label and is designed for two players, as indicated by the dual joystick setup. The cabinet's sides are mostly plain yellow, with a simple red triangular graphic near the control panel area. The top of the cabinet displays red text and graphics, likely indicating the game's title or branding, but there is no illuminated marquee. The back of the cabinet is unadorned, and there is no visible coin slot or mechanism.
description: A yellow upright arcade game cabinet with a flat screen, two joysticks, six red buttons, and minimal red graphics. The design is simple, with red accents and no visible coin slot or elaborate side artwork.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat display screen, two black and red joysticks, six red buttons, and a 'WARNING' label on the control panel.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the cabinet's slanted profile and a red triangular graphic near the control panel area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, unadorned yellow back with no visible features or access panels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same slanted profile and red triangular graphic.
attribute_screen_type: unknown; the screen is flat with a thick bezel, but the display technology is not visually identifiable.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two black and red joysticks with six red buttons arranged in two rows, suitable for two players side-by-side; control panel is yellow with red accents and a 'WARNING' label.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Red triangular graphic near the control panel area; otherwise, the side panels are plain yellow.
